title: consolida orientalis subsp. hispanica
intro: Consolida orientalis subsp. hispanica, also known as Spanish forget-me-not or Consolida, is a plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Consolida orientalis subsp. hispanica include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. Consolida orientalis subsp. hispanica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
